description: A researcher is preparing a manuscript for the 'Journal of Applied AI' and needs to format references using their proprietary style. Install the custom citation style located at '/home/ga/Documents/journal-of-applied-ai.csl' and create a bibliography in RTF format for the following papers: 'Deep Learning' (LeCun, Bengio, Hinton, 2015), 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017), and 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., 2014). Use the 'Journal of Applied AI' style and save the resulting file to '/home/ga/Documents/bibliography.rtf'.
